ticker_headline: India Under Modi: Shrinking Democracy, Growing Inequalities
blog_title: Democracy: The DLC Nobody Asked For
blog_content: The India Forum claims our 'Democracy' meter is depleting while 'Inequality' hits a new high score. In Rajneeti, we call this 'Streamlining the UI.' Why bother with complex voter mechanics when you can focus on 'High-Value Donors' and 'HQ Management'? If your 'Democratic Space' debuff is active, just spam the 'Rally' button and boost your 'Charisma' to mask the stats. Remember, a smaller democracy means fewer NPCs to manage. It’s not a systemic failure; it’s an elite-tier speedrun strategy. Grind those inequalities for maximum power and ignore the patch notes!
social_post: Democracy shrinking? Inequality peaking? In the Rajneeti meta, we call that 'Streamlining for a High Score.' 📉 Buff your HQ and ignore the critics. #RajneetiGame #PoliticalStrategy #ModiMeta #GamingTheSystem
